授業方法: Class will be face to face style. In this class, students will practice using the target language through a variety of lessons and activities.  Pair and group work will be an integral part of each class.  Situational pair work dialog construction and presentation will also be a fundamental part of the course.

第1回:
【Startup Week】         【Flex Hours】       "Online class（On-demand format）"        《30 minutes》
Welcome back, review of first semester
第2回: 【Core Weeks 1】         "Face-to-face class" 《90 minutes》 Course outline, summer interview chart, short individual speeches about your holiday
Review of course outline and questions. 45 minutes of preparation.
第3回: 【Core Weeks 2】   "Face-to-face class"  《90 minutes》 Text " Health" physical and mental variables, pair work gap exercise, habits and routines
News article and related questions assignment. One hour of out of class study.
第4回: 【Core Weeks 3】  "Face-to-face class"  《90 minutes》　　　Text "Health" continued, pair work "who, when, what, how" questions and answers, dialog construction and presentation
Health related grammar worksheet. One hour of study.
第5回: 【Core Weeks 4】   "Face-to-face class" 《90 minutes》　　Text "Fashion" the economics of fashion, choose the correct vocabulary drills, comparative adjectives
Constructing a fashion related dialog. One hour of preparation.
第6回: 【Core Weeks 5】       "Face-to-face class"  《90 minutes》　　Text "Fashion" continued, making probable prediction, expressing opinions, dialog construction of today's fashion trends
Begin presentation preparation. One hour or more of out of class study.
第7回: 【Flex Hours】       Online class（On-demand format）"      《90 minutes》　　Video presentation, details to be announced
第8回: 【Core Weeks 6】  "Face-to-face class"   《90 minutes》　　"The Global Market" news article and explanation, individual presentations first draft
Revision of presentation and practice. One hour or more of study.
第9回: 【Core Weeks 7】     "Face-to-face class"《90 minutes》 Individual presentations and feedback, group activity: What is Japan famous for?
Comments on presentation feedback. One hour of study.
第10回: 【Core Weeks 8】   "Face-to-face class" 《90 minutes》　　　Text "Bushido" reading comprehension questions, vocabulary matching, pair work gap exercise
Choosing an historical figure, short essay. One hour or more of study.
第11回: 【Core Weeks 9】   "Face-to-face class"   《90 minutes》　　Text "Bushido" continued, western historical perspective, discussion questions
Discussion questions continued. One hour of out of class study.
第12回: 【Flex Hours】        "Online class（On-demand format）"      《60 minutes》   Dialog topics to be presented
第13回: 【Core Weeks 10】   "Face-to-face class" 《90 minutes》　　Text "Galapagos Islands" be like and look like exercise, asking indirect questions
Common grammatical errors worksheet. One hour of study.
第14回: 【Flex Hours】       Online class（On-demand format）"      《90 minutes》　　Video presentation, details to be announced
Essay: A good travel experience. One hour of out of class study, exam preparation
第15回: 【Core Weeks 11】  ( Face to face )   《90 minutes》Text "Galapagos Islands" continued, grammar drills, making a detailed itinerary、test explanation, practice, course review
Prepare short comments for the end of the school year
第16回: 【Core Weeks 12】   "Face-to-face class"   《90 minutes》　　【Classes and examinations period】
トピック.授業外学習2: Students would be advised to do as much personal study outside the classroom as possible.  Also, to submit any homework assignments on time.

教科書/Required texts0: "Think About It"  Joe M Jacobs   Marathon Publishing
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
